A weapon designed by the Wula Empire Armaments Department during its golden age. It loads slowly, is enormous in size, and can only be equipped by the largest war platforms. The cutting beam it fires can almost cross the battlefield, erasing all enemies in its path.
LanguageData.Wula_CR_Mobile_Factory_Turret.label: CRt-91 "Iridium-Osmium"
LanguageData.Wula_CR_Mobile_Factory_Turret.descriptio: One of the turrets equipped on the Wula Empire's Landstrider, capable of spraying armor-penetrating melta beams to handle threats approaching the Landstrider.
LanguageData.Wula_MR_Mobile_Factory_Turret.label: CRt-60 "Meteoric Phosphorus"
LanguageData.Wula_MR_Mobile_Factory_Turret.descriptio: One of the turrets equipped on the Wula Empire's Landstrider, a fast-firing autocannon that can suppress and kill swathes of enemies.
LanguageData.Wula_LR_Mobile_Factory_Turret.label: CRt-26 "Crystal Cluster"
LanguageData.Wula_LR_Mobile_Factory_Turret.descriptio: One of the turrets equipped on the Wula Empire's Landstrider. It has long range and high power, capable of leveling resistant enemies at a distance.
LanguageData.WULA_MechFlyerTurretGun.label: Magnetic Force Beam
LanguageData.WULA_MechFlyerTurretGun.description: A built-in turret that can steal weapons from others.
LanguageData.Wula_AI_Heavy_Panzer_Turret_Weapon.label: ATt-2 "Lapis Lazuli"
LanguageData.Wula_AI_Heavy_Panzer_Turret_Weapon.descr: The turret of the HAp-6 "Panzer," capable of precisely eliminating high-value targets from extreme distances.
LanguageData.Wula_AI_Heavy_Panzer_Main_Weapon.label: SDm-2 "Moonstone"
LanguageData.Wula_AI_Heavy_Panzer_Main_Weapon.descrip: The assault gun on the front hull of the HAp-6 "Panzer." It has very short range and can only fire while stationary, but its power is immense, specifically designed to deal with fortified positions and dense clusters of personnel.
LanguageData.Wula_AI_Rocket_Panzer_Turret_Weapon.desc: The turret of the HRp-3 "Flamethrower Panzer," capable of firing a large number of rockets in one salvo.
LanguageData.Wula_Psi_Titan_Beam.label: KLb-15 "Calcite"
LanguageData.Wula_Psi_Titan_Beam.description: A weapon used by the psychic war mechanoid PAt-6 "Psychic Titan" to mark targets. It has no ability to harm enemies.
